use_cases: Displaying a loading state while waiting for data to fetch
Showing a typing indicator during message composition
Providing feedback during async API calls
Visual cue during file uploads or processing
ai_summary: A minimalist bouncing dots loading indicator component with customizable dot count, optional message placement, and smooth Framer Motion animations. The dots bounce in a staggered sequence creating a playful, attention-grabbing effect perfect for indicating ongoing processes or loading states in any application context.
